issues_classified.description: Theorem 2 (Cumulative Alignment Bound) validated but result is NEGATIVE: bar_delta vs gen_gap Spearman rho=-0.379, p=0.121 (not significant); sup_delta vs gen_gap rho=0.045, p=0.858 (not significant). Neither cumulative nor worst-case alignment predicts generalization. Paper currently claims bound 'strictly improves on worst-case analysis' -- this is empirically unsupported.
issues_classified.suggestion: Demote Theorem 2 from 'major contribution' to 'theoretical proposition.' Rewrite Section 4.4 honestly: 'The cumulative alignment bound is theoretically tighter (rho=-0.38 vs rho=0.05 for worst-case), but neither achieves statistical significance at n=18.' Add scatter plot (theorem2_validation.png already exists) as Figure 7 with honest caption. Remove 'strictly improves' language. Estimated: 2 hours writing.

issues_classified.description: Lyapunov function V_t empirically INCREASES throughout training, directly contradicting Theorem 1's guarantee V_{t+1} <= V_t. Paper hand-waves this as 'dominated by mu_t*||w_t||^2 term.' Task fix_lyapunov_definition is in task_plan but not yet executed (status: not started, depends_on: []).
issues_classified.suggestion: Execute task fix_lyapunov_definition from task_plan.json. Three concrete options: (1) Redefine V_t = f(w_t) alone and verify it decreases. (2) Acknowledge the practical learning rate exceeds 1/L making the guarantee vacuous, and present as asymptotic/theoretical. (3) Decompose V_t = f(w_t) + mu_t*||w_t||^2, show f(w_t) decreases while ||w_t||^2 increases, explain V_t increase is driven by norm growth not divergence. Update Sections 4.2 and 6.3. Estimated: 3 hours.

issues_classified.description: Paper scope STILL narrower than claimed: abstract promises 105 experiments, 7 methods, 2 optimizers, 2 architectures, but paper body evaluates only ResNet-20 with AdamW on CIFAR-10/100. VGG-16-BN data exists (iter_005, 4 methods x 3 seeds, phi spread 0.16%) and task integrate_vgg_data exists in task_plan but is not yet executed. Figures now include multi_arch_comparison.pdf but paper text does not reference it.
issues_classified.suggestion: Execute integrate_vgg_data task immediately -- zero compute cost. Add VGG-16-BN data as Table 3 in paper. Reference multi_arch_comparison.pdf/png figure. Also add half_lambda + random_mask to ResNet-20 Table 2 from iter_003 data. This addresses the scope gap with zero GPU time. Estimated: 2 hours writing.

issues_classified.description: Theory-experiment optimizer mismatch: ALL theorems assume SGD dynamics. ALL experiments use AdamW. PMP-WD costate derived for SGD momentum but applied to AdamW. Paper now has SGD experiments (iter_003) but these are NOT referenced in current paper.md (paper was rewritten in iter_007 without SGD section).
issues_classified.suggestion: Two actions: (1) Re-add SGD results section from iter_003/005 data showing WD matters under SGD (validates Phi Invariance Conjecture boundary condition). (2) Add explicit limitation: 'Our theoretical analysis assumes vanilla SGD dynamics; extending to AdamW preconditioner is left to future work.' Estimated: 2 hours.

issues_classified.description: CIFAR-100 data provenance mismatch persists: 5 of 6 methods' CIFAR-100 data from iter_003, PMP-WD from iter_006. Different code versions. Writing review flags this as Critical -- numbers cannot be independently verified from current workspace.
issues_classified.suggestion: Option A (fast, 1 hour): copy iter_003 summary.json files into current workspace and add explicit provenance note in paper. Option B (thorough, 6 GPU-hours): rerun all CIFAR-100 with same code version. Recommend Option A for iteration 7, Option B if scope expansion to iter_008. Fix CIFAR-100 spread inconsistency (0.76pp vs 0.58pp) simultaneously.

issues_classified.description: Figure 1 is STILL a markdown placeholder. Writing review scores Visual Communication 5/10. certified_band.png/pdf and theorem2_validation.png now exist in writing/figures/ but are not referenced in paper.md. Paper references 6 figures but some reference filenames that don't match actual files.
issues_classified.suggestion: P0: (1) Replace Figure 1 placeholder with fig1_taxonomy.png (already exists). (2) Add certified_band.pdf as new figure showing certified band with method trajectories. (3) Add theorem2_validation.png as Figure 7. (4) Fix all figure filename references to match actual files in writing/figures/. Estimated: 2 hours.

issues_classified.description: Four appendices cited in main text (B.1 Theorem 1 proof, B.3 PMP-WD derivation, B.4 RG derivation, A.3 CSI sensitivity) -- none exist. 5th consecutive iteration flagging this. Writing review: 'Appendix A referenced but no appendix exists.'
issues_classified.suggestion: Write at minimum: B.1 (Theorem 1 proof, 2 hours) and B.3 (PMP-WD derivation, 2 hours). These are essential for a theory-heavy paper. If time-constrained, remove all appendix references from main text instead. Do NOT leave dangling references. Estimated: 4-6 hours for writing, or 30 minutes for reference removal.

issues_classified.description: Theorem numbering non-sequential: Theorems appear as 1, 3, 2, 4 in text. CIFAR-100 spread reported as 0.76pp (abstract), 0.58pp (Section 6.2), 0.76pp (Section 7.1). Random mask (90.12%) cited in Section 7.3 but absent from tables.
issues_classified.suggestion: (1) Renumber theorems sequentially. (2) Standardize CIFAR-100 spread: report 0.58pp (WD methods only) as primary, note 0.76pp inclusive of no-WD parenthetically. (3) Add half_lambda + random_mask to Table 2 or remove dangling Section 7.3 reference. Estimated: 1 hour.

issues_classified.description: Paper's Phi Invariance Conjecture abstract claims 105 experiments across 2 optimizers, 2 architectures -- but paper body has only ResNet-20/AdamW. The abstract-body disconnect will be flagged by any reviewer reading past the first page.
issues_classified.suggestion: Either: (1) Integrate all existing data (VGG-16-BN, SGD, NoBN) into paper body to justify abstract claims, or (2) Narrow abstract to match actual paper content. Option 1 is strongly preferred -- the data EXISTS. Estimated: 3 hours.

issues_classified.description: PMP-WD framing still misleading: paper says 'consistent with optimality' but p=0.12 (not significant), method ordering reversed between iter_003 and iter_006. Cohen's d formula still mislabeled (paired vs unpaired). Banned phrase 'to our knowledge' variant in Section 2.6.
issues_classified.suggestion: Rewrite PMP-WD section: 'PMP-WD achieves comparable accuracy (p=0.12, not significant); method ordering is not reproducible across batches, confirming narrow certified band.' Fix Cohen's d label. Remove banned phrase. Estimated: 1 hour.

issues_classified.description: BEM = 0.000 for half_lambda still flagged as mathematically impossible (should be ~0.5). Iteration 4 fixed this to -0.500 but unclear if current paper reflects the fix.
issues_classified.suggestion: Verify BEM computation for half_lambda in current paper. If still 0.000, update to corrected value. If -0.500, verify this makes physical sense under the BEM definition. Estimated: 30 minutes.

issues_classified.description: Writing-experiment decoupling: 7th consecutive iteration. Paper was rewritten in iter_007 without all planned experiments complete (validate_theorem2 and create_certified_band_viz still 'running' in experiment_state.json). Writing critique checkpoint shows all 6 sections at 'pending' status, meaning the critique pipeline was skipped.
issues_classified.suggestion: Implement experiment_gate: writing_sections must not begin until all experiment tasks in task_plan.json reach 'completed' status AND data audit verifies table numbers match summary.json. This is a system change to orchestrate.py. Estimated: 4 hours system change.

issues_classified.description: ImageNet experiments have failed in 3+ iterations with no root cause diagnosis. Project constraints explicitly require ImageNet. No fallback strategy implemented.
issues_classified.suggestion: Before any retry: (1) Check failure logs for OOM/path/data errors. (2) Verify ImageNet data path exists on compute server. (3) Run single-epoch smoke test with batch_size=32. (4) If infrastructure-blocked, use ImageNet-100 (100 classes, ~13% of data) as lower-risk alternative. Estimated: 2 hours diagnosis.

issues_classified.description: Two tasks (validate_theorem2, create_certified_band_viz) registered as 'running' in experiment_state.json since 2026-03-19T08:57:27 but experiment results directories are empty. These are analysis tasks (gpu_count=0) that should have completed quickly. Possible stale state.
issues_classified.suggestion: Check if these tasks actually ran. Results exist: theorem2_validation.json has full data, certified_band.png/pdf exist in writing/figures/. The experiment_state.json may not have been updated to 'completed'. Manually verify and mark as completed if outputs exist. Estimated: 15 minutes.

issues_classified.description: Lambda_max vs lambda_max(t) notation confusion. Per-layer state variables n_l(t), r_l(t) defined in notation.md but absent from paper. bar_delta_T and delta_T^sup notation inconsistency between notation.md and paper.
issues_classified.suggestion: Add clarifying sentence distinguishing Lambda_max (PMP bound) from lambda_max(t) (certified band). Remove unused per-layer variables from notation.md. Standardize delta notation. Estimated: 30 minutes.

issues_fixed: Theorem 2 now has empirical validation data: 18 data points (6 methods x 3 seeds) with bar_delta, sup_delta, gen_gap computed. Spearman correlations calculated. Scatter plot generated (theorem2_validation.png). Resolves the 'zero validation' gap from iter_006, though the result is negative.

Certified band visualization now exists: certified_band.png/pdf generated showing [lambda_min(t), lambda_max(t)] with method trajectories. Resolves the 'no visualization for central contribution' gap from iter_006.
Paper fully rewritten with unified Phi Invariance Conjecture framing, incorporating multi-optimizer (AdamW + SGD) narrative in abstract. Writing quality scored 8/10 by writing review.
Figure count increased from placeholder+4 to 12+ actual figure files including multi_arch_comparison, theorem2_validation, certified_band, SGD comparison.
success_patterns: Table 2 data integrity remains impeccable: writing review cross-validated every CIFAR-10 accuracy value against summary.json. Zero discrepancies. This standard must be applied to ALL tables.
Phi modulator taxonomy (Table 1) continues to receive universal praise. The observation that CWD, random mask, and PMP-WD all implement bang-bang control is a genuine structural insight.
Statistical honesty maintained: paired t-tests with Bonferroni correction, explicit p-values, non-significance acknowledged. This IS the paper's competitive advantage.
'Weight decay illusion' framing is compelling and memorable. Writing review specifically highlights the directness of the practical takeaway.
PMP-WD implementation efficiency: 6-minute implementation from theory demonstrates the framework produces practical algorithms. Key marketing point.

Three-stage review pipeline (supervisor, critic, writing review) catches distinct non-overlapping issues. All three are essential. Writing review in iter_007 identified 8 issues missed by earlier stages.
Abstract now correctly frames the dual AdamW/SGD finding, which is the paper's strongest empirical contribution.
systemic_patterns: Writing-experiment decoupling: 7th consecutive iteration. The pipeline completes writing stages before all planned experiments finish. Critique checkpoint shows all 6 sections 'pending' -- the quality gate was bypassed.
Missing appendices since iter_003: 5 consecutive iterations flag missing proofs. Zero writing time allocated to appendices. The pipeline systematically deprioritizes appendix writing.

Data integration gap: VGG-16-BN data (iter_005), SGD data (iter_003), NoBN data (iter_005), half_lambda/random_mask data (iter_003) all exist but are not in the current paper. The paper's abstract claims coverage the body does not deliver.

Theoretical claims outrun validation: Theorem 2 now validated but result is negative (rho=-0.38, p=0.12). V_t increasing contradicts Theorem 1. Subsumption fraction (>=95%) unsubstantiated. The paper has more contested theory than confirmed theory.

Quality oscillation: iter_002=8.2, iter_003=5.5, iter_004=5.5, iter_005=7.0, iter_006=5.5, iter_007~6.0. The pivot to unified framework destabilized quality. Each writing rewrite introduces new inconsistencies faster than old ones are resolved.

suggestions: Iteration 7 ran ZERO new GPU experiments. All effort was analysis + writing. This is appropriate IF the analysis tasks complete, but they appear stalled.
Integrate ALL existing cross-iteration data (VGG, SGD, NoBN) into paper -- zero compute, maximum ROI.
Complete the 5 tasks in task_plan.json before starting another writing cycle.
Do not skip the critique pipeline -- it catches issues that supervisor and writing review miss.
Diagnose ImageNet failures before iter_008 allocates GPU time to it.

recommended_focus: P0: Complete fix_lyapunov_definition -- this is the paper's most dangerous theoretical contradiction (3 hours)
P0: Integrate ALL existing data into paper body: VGG-16-BN (Table 3), SGD (Section 5.x), half_lambda+random_mask (Table 2) -- zero compute, 3 hours writing
P0: Fix abstract-body scope disconnect -- abstract claims 105 experiments, body has ~36. Either narrow abstract or integrate data.
P0: Reference existing figures correctly: certified_band, theorem2_validation, multi_arch_comparison are generated but not in paper text (2 hours)
P0: Rewrite Theorem 2 presentation with honest negative result from validation data (rho=-0.38, p=0.12) (1 hour)
P1: Write Appendix B.1 (Theorem 1 proof) and B.3 (PMP-WD derivation) -- 5th consecutive iteration of neglect (4-6 hours)
P1: Fix all remaining writing issues: theorem numbering, CIFAR-100 spread, PMP-WD framing, Cohen's d, banned phrase, notation (2 hours)
P1: Run critique pipeline that was skipped in iter_007 (1 hour)
P2: Diagnose ImageNet failures and implement fallback strategy (2 hours diagnosis)
P2: Implement experiment_gate system change to prevent future writing-experiment decoupling (4 hours system change)
